_comment: Apps Script manifest for the SPREADSHEET-ONLY first-phase intake webhook.
The first lab-write activation is intentionally spreadsheet-only:
no MailApp, no GmailApp, no script.send_mail. The OAuth consent
screen for this project must therefore surface ONLY the spreadsheet
or any `gmail.*` scope appears during authorization, STOP and
re-check the .gs source against the spreadsheet-only contract.
When deploying via clasp, copy this file to the project root as
`appsscript.json` (clasp expects it there). When configuring the
Apps Script project manually in the web UI, open Project Settings
and tick "Show appsscript.json manifest file in editor", then
paste this content into appsscript.json. The explicit oauthScopes
list pins the consent screen to spreadsheets-only and prevents
Apps Script's auto-detection from re-introducing mail scopes.
The deferred mail-notification route lives in a SEPARATE Apps
Script project with its own appsscript.json that DOES include
